# LuxeMia

> LuxeMia is an online Indian ethnic-wear store offering lehengas, sarees, salwar kameez, menswear and jewelry, with sizing and styling support for customers in the USA, Canada and Australia.

## Store information

- Website: https://luxemia.shop
- Customer support: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA
- WhatsApp: +1-215-341-9990
- Email: hello@luxemia.shop
- Destinations currently listed in our shipping policy: USA, Canada and Australia
- Shipping: $25 USD per order; free for orders over $350 USD
- Fit options vary by product and may include semi-stitched, ready-to-wear and made-to-measure

## Shopping categories

- Lehengas: https://luxemia.shop/lehengas
- Sarees: https://luxemia.shop/sarees
- Salwar suits: https://luxemia.shop/suits
- Menswear: https://luxemia.shop/menswear
- Indo-Western: https://luxemia.shop/indowestern
- Jewelry: https://luxemia.shop/jewelry
- New arrivals: https://luxemia.shop/new-arrivals
- Featured styles: https://luxemia.shop/bestsellers
- All collections: https://luxemia.shop/collections

## Customer guidance

- Shipping policy: https://luxemia.shop/shipping
- Returns and cancellations: https://luxemia.shop/returns
- Size guide: https://luxemia.shop/size-guide
- Measurement guide: https://luxemia.shop/sizing-measurements-guide
- Style consultation: https://luxemia.shop/style-consultation
- FAQ: https://luxemia.shop/faq
- Contact: https://luxemia.shop/contact

## Important policy information

- Dispatch and transit times depend on the product, tailoring option and destination.
- Customs duties, taxes and carrier processing fees may apply. They depend on destination, product classification, value and current rules, and are not included unless checkout explicitly states otherwise.
- Standard-size, tailored and damaged-item eligibility differs. Review the current returns policy before purchasing.
- Product availability, price, size and delivery information on the product page and at checkout take priority over summaries in guides.

## Regional pages

- NRI shopping hub: https://luxemia.shop/nri
- USA: https://luxemia.shop/indian-ethnic-wear-usa
- Canada: https://luxemia.shop/indian-ethnic-wear-canada

## Editorial policy

LuxeMia articles are published by the LuxeMia Editorial Team. Time-sensitive customs, tax and shipping information should be confirmed with the relevant government authority. LuxeMia does not present unverified customer counts, sales rankings or individual staff credentials.

Full page inventory: https://luxemia.shop/llms-full.txt
